title: Oil Soon Could Gush Higher to $100: 4 High-Dividend Energy Stocks to Buy Now

title: Williams Companies, Inc. The (WMB) Upgraded to Strong Buy: What Does It Mean for the Stock?

title: Oil And Gas Stocks Expected To Remain Strong: 5 Top Midstream Energy Stock Picks For 2022
text: Oil and gas stocks had a great year in 2021, and analysts expect the favorable energy market environment to continue in 2022. On Tuesday, Bank of America analyst Chase Mulvehill chose his five top stock picks for 2022 in the midstream oil and gas and MLP group.

title: 3 Oil Pipeline Stocks to Gain on the Prospering Industry
text: Despite Omicron spreading rapidly worldwide, the outlook for the Zacks Oil and Gas - Production & Pipelines industry is bullish. Kinder Morgan (KMI), Williams Companies (WMB) and MPLX LP (MPLX) are the frontrunners in the industry.

title: The Williams Companies: Solid 6% Yield And Growth Prospects
text: WMB is heavily focused on the natural gas space, which gives it some advantages over other midstream companies. The demand for natural gas is likely to grow going forward and the company has $1.5 billion worth of growth prospects to take advantage of this.
